verdict.summary: Workflow failed 2 gating check(s). Resolve every reason below and re-run.

reasons.title: 1 HIGH-severity finding(s) present
reasons.detail: HIGH findings are release blockers regardless of category.
remediation: Open the Findings section below and resolve every HIGH item.
Re-run this auditor; the verdict should flip to PASS once all HIGH items are cleared.

reasons.title: No Error Workflow configured
reasons.detail: Without an Error Workflow, runtime failures are silent -- no alerts, no audit trail.
remediation: Create a dedicated Error Trigger workflow that logs the error payload and sends a notification (Slack/email/PagerDuty).
In Workflow Settings -> Error Workflow, select the workflow you just created.
Re-export and re-run the audit to confirm.

findings.title: No Error Workflow configured
findings.recommendation: Create an Error Trigger workflow that logs + notifies on failures, and attach it here.

findings.title: Node 'Fetch Customer Records (Airtable)' is unreachable (no incoming connections)
findings.recommendation: Delete the node or connect it from upstream.

findings.title: Node 'Classify Sentiment (OpenAI)' is unreachable (no incoming connections)
findings.recommendation: Delete the node or connect it from upstream.

findings.title: Node 'Write Report to Google Docs' is unreachable (no incoming connections)
findings.recommendation: Delete the node or connect it from upstream.
